race.comment: The Phillip Cole yard has a stranglehold on this with seven entries. BRASH LASS (8) is a former Victorian who has had two runs for the yard. Placed here fresh then bombed the start last time, was back and wide throughout and ran on for seventh. Much better than that and fitter again. Has the claim this time and with a better start expected to go close. Stablemate BUADES (2) looks a big danger. Resumed with a determined win over 1000m and extra trip a plus. Fitter again and will be in this for a long way. ECCLESTONE (1) is a former Queenslander having first run for the new yard. Best form stacks up and can give a sight. SASSY ABBEY (10) is another Cole runner who is bursting to win. Still a maiden but has posted back-to-back placings this time in running on hard and will be hard to hold out.
